constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance may contribute non-authoritative plan language only.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates approved improvement evidence, chain continuity, plan content, and replay visibility.
constitutional_invariant.human_authorizes: Implementation planning requires an upstream human-authorized APPROVED improvement approval artifact.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: No worker execution occurs in this runtime; future worker paths remain descriptive only.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Implementation plan created and returned events are persisted as append-only replay artifacts.

known_limits: Improvement Implementation Runtime records implementation plans only.
Execution request creation from implementation plans is not implemented.
Worker dispatch, worker invocation, and worker execution are not implemented by this runtime.
Reflection, self-modification, self-improvement, and self-application remain out of scope.
